positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of mystical forest flora and fauna, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, ethereal moths, and coiled vines framing a central celestial crescent moon. The style should be a refined blend of Art Nouveau and sacred geometry, rendered using thick, crisp linework and negative space. Use a limited, deep color palette of indigo, sapphire blue, moss green, and gold accents. Composition must be centrally balanced, suitable for a repeating, non-directional apparel print, with strong, clean silhouettes. Intricate stippling and cross-hatching textures used for depth, evoking a feeling of enchanted twilight. High contrast, clean edges, professional commercial illustration quality.
negative: blurry, low detail, bad anatomy, distorted, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, grainy, noise, ugly, amateur, messy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs
